blocks.text: Flanders Cobbles, Suzuka Thunder, and Texas Glory on a Monster Sunday

A Norwegian cycling army of seven rides into the Ronde van Vlaanderen, Robert MacIntyre leads the Texas Open with Thorbjørn Olesen lurking, and Formula 1 hits the iconic Suzuka cathedral. One of the year's biggest sporting Sundays.
🚴 Tour of Flanders — Seven Norwegians including Wærenskjold, Hoelgaard and Tiller tackle Monument cycling's cobbled masterpiece from Antwerp to Oudenaarde at 10:00
⛳ Valero Texas Open final round — Thorbjørn Olesen at -9 chases leader MacIntyre (-14); Masters qualification places on the line at 06:00
🏎️ Japanese Grand Prix — Antonelli leads the championship by 9 points over Russell; Suzuka's technical demands set for a pivotal Round 3 at 07:00
